findings.evidence: `rg` hits: `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Subgroup/Ker.lean:71` has `MonoidHom.subsingleton_coe_range`; `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Subgroup/Lattice.lean:171` has `Subgroup.eq_bot_of_subsingleton`; `mathlib/Mathlib/AlgebraicTopology/FundamentalGroupoid/SimplyConnected.lean:69` gives `Subsingleton (FundamentalGroup X x)`; Mathlib already uses exactly this pattern in `mathlib/Mathlib/Topology/Homotopy/Lifting.lean:609-610`.
findings.fix: Remove these wrappers and prove the needed inclusion inline from `MonoidHom.subsingleton_coe_range`, `Subgroup.eq_bot_of_subsingleton`, the existing `SimplyConnectedSpace` fundamental-group subsingleton instance, and `bot_le`.
findings.issue: `map_range_eq_bot_of_subsingleton` and its simply-connected/range-inclusion corollaries duplicate generic `MonoidHom` range and `Subgroup` bottom facts specialized to fundamental groups.

summary: The new fundamental-group range lemmas are thin specializations of existing generic Mathlib subgroup-range API, creating parallel API instead of reusing it.
